message:
web: Add formatted TodoWrite tool rendering

Render TodoWrite tool as a nice checklist instead of raw JSON:
- Checkbox icons for pending/completed states
- Strikethrough for completed items
- White text +

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/zj757k0zz3j3c2ygbt963ah4"in progress" badge for active items
- Shows completion count in collapsed header
